zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Margaretha Schaffers於1681年6月出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾沙爾肯多福時，她的父親Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer29歲，母親Anna Apollonia Weber26歲。她於1725年5月15日與Wendel Leibenguth在法國阿爾薩斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1758年4月6日在美國賓夕法尼亞州貝可斯圖爾可 堂史普莫特 艾特納享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Margaretha Schaffers于1681年6月出生在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾沙爾肯多福时，她的父亲Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer29岁，母亲Anna Apollonia Weber26岁。她于1725年5月15日与Wendel Leibenguth在法国阿爾薩斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1758年4月6日在美国宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯圖爾可 堂史普莫特 艾特納享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Schaffers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Horst.
German and Swiss German: habitational name from a place so named in Switzerland.
German (Silesia): from a shortened form of Schaffroth, a nickname for someone who is ready to give advice, Middle High German schaffen ‘to create, to bring about’ + rāt ‘counsel’.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Margaretha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.
Historical Boundaries 1752: Berks, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Berks, Pennsylvania, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Margaretha Schaffers was born in June 1681, in Schalkendorf, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, her father, Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer, was 29 and her mother, Anna Apollonia Weber, was 26. She married Wendel Leibenguth on 15 May 1725, in Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 6 April 1758, in Mount Aetna, Tulpehocken Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Margaretha Schaffers est née en juin 1681, à Schalkendorf, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Anna Apollonia Weber, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Wendel Leibenguth le 15 mai 1725, à Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 6 avril 1758, à Mount Aetna, Tulpehocken Township, Berks, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 76 ans.

Sie hat am 15. Mai 1725 in Elsaß, Frankreich Wendel Leibenguth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 6. ko.lifeSummary: Anna Margaretha Schaffers(이)가 1681년 6월 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 샤켄도르프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Apollonia Weber(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1725년 5월 15일 프랑스 알사스에서 Wendel Leibenguth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1758년 4월 6일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 버크스 투p호c켄 타운시프 모우트 아이트나에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Margaretha Schaffers родилась июнь 1681 г. в местности щэлкендорф, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, её отцу по имени Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Apollonia Weber, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wendel Leibenguth 15 мая 1725 г. в местности алсеис, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 6 апреля 1758 г. в местности маунт аетна, тульпэоккен тоуншип, биркс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 76 лет.
